PLAINTIFF SIMON LAEVI Motion To File A Second Amended Complaint IS DENIED FOR INVALID PROOF OF SERVICE. SERVICE WAS ON OCTOBER 18, 2005. MOTION WAS FILED ON JANUARY 11, 2006.
